pos_run_epa_z.what: EPA on position-specific gap runs (scrambles excluded)
pos_run_epa_z.how: Tackles → end-gap. Guards → guard+tackle gap. Center → guard-gap+middle. QB scrambles filtered out. Z-scored within position group.
pos_run_epa_z.limits: Team-level. Position-group z-scoring ensures fair comparison.

pos_run_success_z.how: % gaining positive EPA. Z-scored within position group.

pos_run_explosive_z.what: Explosive rate (10+ yds) on position-specific runs
pos_run_explosive_z.limits: Tackles naturally see more explosives on outside runs — position-group z-scoring accounts for this.

sg_run_epa_z.what: EPA on position-specific runs from shotgun formation
sg_run_epa_z.how: Shotgun runs through this position's gaps. Captures outside zone and spread run game. Z-scored within position group.
sg_run_epa_z.limits: Smaller sample than overall. Requires 10+ shotgun runs to qualify.

uc_run_epa_z.what: EPA on position-specific runs from under center
uc_run_epa_z.how: Under center runs through this position's gaps. Captures power, counter, and gap scheme. Z-scored within position group.

uc_run_success_z.what: Success rate on under center runs

uc_run_explosive_z.what: Explosive rate on under center runs

team_sack_rate_z.what: Team sack rate — fewer sacks = better
team_sack_rate_z.how: Sacks / dropbacks. Inverted. Z-scored against all OL.

team_pressure_rate_z.what: Team pressure rate — less pressure = better

penalty_epa_per_game_z.what: Penalty EPA cost per game — less damage = better

snap_share_z.what: Share of team's max OL snaps
